name: Spyder Cannabis Inc.
summary: Spyder Cannabis Inc. engages in the retail of various cannabis products in Canada and the United States. The company offers electronic cigarettes, cannabis supplies, e-juices, and accessories. It sells its products through a chain of five vape stores in Woodbridge, Scarborough, Pickering, Niagara Falls, and Burlington, Ontario, as well as through online. In addition, the company engages in the development of hemp-based products. Spyder Cannabis Inc. was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Woodbridge, Canada.
